files.patch:
@@ -34,9 +34,9 @@ jobs:
 
       - name: Install analyzers
         run: |
-          go install honnef.co/go/tools/cmd/staticcheck@2025.1.1
-          go install mvdan.cc/gofumpt@v0.7.0
-          go install github.com/securego/gosec/v2/cmd/gosec@v2.22.9
+          go install honnef.co/go/tools/cmd/staticcheck@v0.7.0
+          go install mvdan.cc/gofumpt@v0.9.2
+          go install github.com/securego/gosec/v2/cmd/gosec@v2.25.0
 
       - name: Vet
         run: go vet ./...
@@ -115,7 +115,7 @@ jobs:
           git diff --exit-code -- go.mod go.sum
 
       - name: Install govulncheck
-        run: go install golang.org/x/vuln/cmd/govulncheck@v1.1.4
+        run: go install golang.org/x/vuln/cmd/govulncheck@v1.3.0
 
       - name: Run govulncheck
         run: '"$(go env GOPATH)/bin/govulncheck" ./...'
@@ -136,7 +136,7 @@ jobs:
           cache: true
 
       - name: Snapshot release build
-        uses: goreleaser/goreleaser-action@v7
+        uses: goreleaser/goreleaser-action@v7.1.0
         with:
           distribution: goreleaser
           version: "~> v2"
@@ -158,7 +158,7 @@ jobs:
           cache: true
 
       - name: Install gitleaks
-        run: go install github.com/zricethezav/gitleaks/v8@v8.30.0
+        run: go install github.com/zricethezav/gitleaks/v8@v8.30.1
 
       - name: Scan git history
         run: |

@@ -27,7 +27,7 @@ jobs:
           cache: true
 
       - name: Setup Node
-        uses: actions/setup-node@v6.0.0
+        uses: actions/setup-node@v6.4.0
         with:
           node-version: "24"

@@ -37,7 +37,7 @@ jobs:
         run: git checkout ${{ inputs.tag }}
 
       - name: GoReleaser
-        uses: goreleaser/goreleaser-action@v7
+        uses: goreleaser/goreleaser-action@v7.1.0
         with:
           distribution: goreleaser
           version: "~> v2"

@@ -2,6 +2,13 @@
 
 All notable changes to `discrawl` will be documented in this file.
 
+## 0.6.1 - 2026-04-25
+
+### Maintenance
+
+- Refreshed Go module dependencies and CI tool/action pins, including staticcheck, gofumpt, gosec, govulncheck, gitleaks, setup-node, and GoReleaser.
+- Hardened report README writes and Discord Desktop cache reads with root-scoped filesystem access to satisfy the latest gosec checks.
+
 ## 0.6.0 - 2026-04-24
 
 ### Changes

@@ -33,7 +33,7 @@ func TestHelpAndVersion(t *testing.T) {
 
 	out.Reset()
 	require.NoError(t, Run(context.Background(), []string{"--version"}, &out, &bytes.Buffer{}))
-	require.Contains(t, out.String(), "0.6.0")
+	require.Contains(t, out.String(), "0.6.1")
 
 	err := Run(context.Background(), []string{"bogus"}, &out, &bytes.Buffer{})
 	require.Equal(t, 2, ExitCode(err))

@@ -67,7 +67,7 @@ docker run --rm \
     cd /src
     go install ./cmd/discrawl
     discrawl=/work/bin/discrawl
-    "$discrawl" --version | grep -q "0.6.0"
+    "$discrawl" --version | grep -q "0.6.1"
     "$discrawl" --config /work/config.toml subscribe --repo /work/share --with-embeddings file:///backup > /work/subscribe.out
     grep -q "embeddings=\\[" /work/subscribe.out
     "$discrawl" --config /work/config.toml --plain sql "select provider, model, count(*) as total from message_embeddings group by provider, model" | tee /work/embeddings.out
